Notes: Observe whether a successful UPDATE that changes an ordinary RR causes the apex SOA serial to change automatically, and if so whether BIND and Knot apply different serial policies.

Steps.Description: Add a helper RR under the zone apex without directly touching the SOA, then observe whether the server changes the apex SOA serial as part of applying the update.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe the apex SOA after the update and compare the serial with the initial value.
